## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to a single component (or clearly justified if cross-component)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`conan build` / `npm test` as appropriate)
- [ ] Every new source file carries the required license header (two lines, right comment prefix for the file's language):
  ```
  // SPDX-License-Identifier: LGPL-3.0-or-later
  // Copyright (C) <year> The Fletcher Authors
  ```
- [ ] Public API additions or behaviour changes are reflected in the component's `README.md`
- [ ] If a Conan package version changed, the tag format matches (`<component>-v<version>`)
